name: chokepoint-ransomware-service-emulation
description: Create test services, bulk stop+disable+delete. Expected: EID 7036/7040 (service state changes).

detectionQueries.name: Bulk Service Stop
detectionQueries.query: DeviceEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where ActionType == 'ServiceTerminated' | summarize StopCount = count() by DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, 5m) | where StopCount > 3

detectionQueries.name: Service Config Changes
detectionQueries.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 7040 | where StartType == 'disabled' | summarize Count = count() by Computer, ServiceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | where Count > 1

detectionQueries.name: Service Deletion
detectionQueries.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 7046 | project TimeGenerated, Computer, ServiceName, AccountName
